name: pr-reviewer
title: PR Reviewer
summary: Automated GitHub PR code review with diff analysis, lint integration, and structured reports. Use when reviewing pull requests, checking for security issues, error handling gaps, test coverage, or code style problems. Supports Go, Python, and JavaScript/TypeScript. Requires `gh` CLI authenticated with repo access.

category.l1: B. 工程实现与质量保障
category.l3: B3-1. 安全审查与问题定位

recommended_action: 纳入标准化台账并继续评估
tags: B. 工程实现与质量保障
